title: Mark Ollama topic test as integration to avoid hanging default pytest runs

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Investigating CI parity for full pytest runs. Comparing local env/bootstrap with .github/workflows/ci.yaml and reproducing invoke ci under py311-dev to isolate environment drift without changing test behavior.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Found root cause for local pytest stall: host had Ollama daemon running (listening on 127.0.0.1:11434) which caused ollama_test to execute a real long-running model call. Stopped service (); port now closed.
